name: Holiday Eggnog Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, sugar, nutmeg and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Soften the gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
3. Combine the cream cheese and sugar at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Gradually add the gelatin and eggnog, mixing until blended.
5. Chill until slightly thickened; fold in the whipped cream.
6. Pour over the crust; chill until firm.
VARIATION:
Ingrate 1/3 cup Sugar. Substitute Milk for Eggnog. Add 1 teaspoon Vanilla and 3/4 teaspoon Rum Extract. Continue as directed.
